allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''user_id:'''', d.get\(''''user_id''''\)\); [print\(f''''  {k}: {type\(v\).__name__} \({len\(str\(v\)\)} chars\)''''\) for k,v in d.items\(\) if k not in \(''''id'''',''''user_id'''',''''created_at'''',''''updated_at''''\)]")
Bash(sed -i '' 's/relational_depth_range: \\[early, developing, established\\]/relational_depth_range: [first_encounter, early, developing, established]/' "$f")

Bash(sed -i '' 's/  \\/\\/ Priority 88: Person context — who you''''re talking to \(skip for light if already in condensed identity\)/  \\/\\/ Priority 88: Person context — who you''''re talking to/' src/lib/intermediary/index.ts)

Bash(# Copy conversation-tracker — imports ResponseDirective from ./types
cp src/lib/intermediary/conversation-tracker.ts src/lib/platform/conversation-tracker.ts

# Copy policy-loader — imports Policy from ./types

# Copy reformulator — imports from ./types and backbone/types

echo "Copied and updated 3 files with ./types imports")
